title: helianthemum marmoreum
intro: Helianthemum marmoreum, also known as the Rockrose or False Rose, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Helianthemum marmoreum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
